title: ACME Admin Tools
description: Silly and fun in-game tools to amuse and help server owners moderate their players in a diegetic fashion.
body:
ACME is here to help you with moderating your players and your worlds! A word of warning, the tools in this mod are meant as **admin or mod only**. 

Inside, you'll find things to move players around, things to prevent them from moving, and a variety of ways to kick and ban players in *very* cinematic fashion. 

You'll also find new tools such as the Alchemical Laser, for long-range potion application, and much more. 

ACME items are only usable by players with OP level 3 or higher, and players with OP level 1 or higher are immune to them.

The utility command `/acme mod_tool` can be used to obtain a Ban Hammer or Boot on a Stick (optionally one that tempbans a player).  
The utility command `/acme potion` can be used to manipulate potion-holding items.
